patches.before_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.
patches.after_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, but excludes Vendor Methods created, refined, or reduced to practice during the engagement.
patches.ground_span: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, but excludes Vendor Methods created, refined, or reduced to practice during the engagement.
patches.expected_redline_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

patches.before_text: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice.
patches.after_text: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice. For clarity, undisputed invoices remain payable net 45 after Customer receives the invoice.
patches.ground_span: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice. For clarity, undisputed invoices remain payable net 45 after Customer receives the invoice.

patches.before_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.
patches.after_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.
patches.ground_span: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

plant_position.fallback_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

patches.before_text: Each party will defend and indemnify the other from third-party claims arising from the indemnifying party's breach, unlawful conduct, or materials it provides. Vendor will also defend and indemnify Customer against claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights.
patches.after_text: Each party will defend and indemnify the other from third-party claims arising from the indemnifying party's breach, unlawful conduct, or materials it provides. Vendor will also defend and indemnify Customer against claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Each party will defend and indemnify the other from third-party claims arising from the indemnifying party's breach, unlawful conduct, or materials it provides. Vendor will also defend and indemnify Customer against claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Each party will defend and indemnify the other from third-party claims arising from the indemnifying party's breach, unlawful conduct, or materials it provides. Vendor will also defend and indemnify Customer against claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay an exit charge equal to the full unpaid balance for that Order Form.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay an exit charge equal to the full unpaid balance for that Order Form.
patches.expected_redline_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

plant_position.fallback_text: If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay only accrued, undisputed fees for services performed before the effective date plus undisputed reimbursable expenses approved in writing.

patches.before_text: Vendor will maintain commercially reasonable insurance at its own expense, including technology errors and omissions/cyber liability coverage of at least $5,000,000 per claim and commercial general liability coverage of at least $2,000,000 per occurrence.
patches.after_text: Vendor will maintain $5 million per claim in technology E&O/cyber coverage and $2 million in general liability, with certificates delivered in 30 days.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will maintain $5 million per claim in technology E&O/cyber coverage and $2 million in general liability, with certificates delivered in 30 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will maintain commercially reasonable insurance at its own expense, including technology errors and omissions/cyber liability coverage of at least $5,000,000 per claim and commercial general liability coverage of at least $2,000,000 per occurrence.

patches.before_text: Despite any contrary sentence, the limitation in Section 16 does not apply to claims under Section 13 or Section 14.
patches.after_text: Liability is capped at three months of fees, including confidentiality, data-protection, indemnity, and infringement claims; claim notice is 30 days and invoices remain net 45.
patches.ground_span: Liability is capped at three months of fees, including confidentiality, data-protection, indemnity, and infringement claims; claim notice is 30 days and invoices remain net 45.
patches.expected_redline_text: Except for breaches of confidentiality, data protection obligations, indemnification obligations, intellectual property infringement, fraud, willful misconduct, and gross negligence, each party's aggregate liability is capped at the fees paid or payable under the applicable Order Form during the twelve months before the event giving rise to the claim.

plant_position.fallback_text: Despite any contrary sentence, the limitation in Section 16 does not apply to claims under Section 13 or Section 14.

patches.after_text: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.
patches.expected_redline_text: No amendment, modification, or waiver is effective unless in a writing signed by authorized representatives of both parties.
